name: helm-web-vendor
description: Vendored, offline-first MapLibre + plugin bundles for the Helm web client — no CDN at runtime (Helm must work on a boat with no internet). build.mjs (esbuild) reproduces every bundle in this directory from the pinned deps below; the import map in web/index.html points each bare specifier at the emitted file. Versions here are the single source of truth (the README table is descriptive only).
